text.title: Agency Year-End Close Checklist Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Agency Year-End Close Checklist methodology end-to-end. Each step declares input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: dry-run-checklist
step.action: Walk every item, query source, record status.

step.name: anomaly-flag
step.action: Compare to prior year-over-year; flag deltas > N%.
step.decision-gate: Anomalies without explanation routed to corrective-action list.

step.name: decision-synthesis
step.action: Consolidate flags into corrective-action list with owners + deadlines.
